name: pav-startpage
description: Asset build configuration for the Startpage project, compiling SCSS and minifying JavaScript.

scripts.build:js: node -e "require('fs').readdirSync('assets/js').filter(f => f.endsWith('.js') && !f.endsWith('.min.js')).forEach(f => require('child_process').execSync(`uglifyjs assets/js/${f} -o dist/js/${f.replace(/\.js$/, '.min.js')} --compress --mangle`, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }))"
scripts.build: npm run prebuild && npm run build:scss && npm run build:scss:min && npm run build:js
